text.title: Scope Drift Early-Warning Metrics — Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to produce the artefact end-to-end.

step.name: configure-connectors
step.input: ticket-system API + parking-lot CSV + baseline mapping
step.action: Wire credentials; verify joins on ticket-id, baseline-id.

step.name: nightly-compute
step.action: Pull tickets + parking lot; compute the five metrics; persist to dashboard.

step.name: threshold-check
step.action: Compare to baseline-relative thresholds; emit trigger events with owner + SLA.

step.name: daily-summary
step.action: Translate metrics into a PM-readable digest.

step.name: weekly-review
step.action: Cross-metric trend commentary; queue any needed re-baseline.
